parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'gmail_test_email_template_key' THEN value END) AS gmail_test_email_template_key,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_sender_name' THEN value END) AS email_sender_name,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_reply_to' THEN value END) AS email_reply_to
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('gmail_test_email_template_key', 'email_sender_name', 'email_reply_to');
